payload.summary: All 3 blockers and 6 majors from iteration 1 fixed correctly. 2 new minor findings (test coverage gap on AuthService + JSDoc note). No regressions. Ready for security + integration parallel gate.

findings.message: Inline onerror="..." replaced with Angular (error)="onImgError($event)" binding. CSP-safe.
findings.verification: empty-state.component.ts:42-44 declares onImgError() method; grep returns zero hits for onerror in production source.

findings.message: Same pattern as R-FE-001 — Angular event binding + onImgError() on component class. CSP-safe.

localStorage fallback removed. New AuthService (providedIn: 'root', Signal-backed, sessionStorage-only) introduced. Guard delegates to authService.isAuthenticatedSnapshot(). Spec's localStorage-allows test case removed.
findings.verification: grep -rn localStorage frontend/src returns only documentation comments — zero functional reads/writes.

findings.message: parseFloat removed. ARIA-label path (precision-critical, spoken to user) now does string-based baht/satang extraction via buildAriaLabelFromString(). Display path retains Number() for Intl.NumberFormat (acceptable: banking balances far below 9e15 safe-integer boundary, documented in code).
findings.verification: New precision test added in pipes.spec.ts:106-112.

findings.message: Migrated from retryWhen to retry({ count, delay }). 401/403 short-circuit via throwError() in delay callback — never retried. Exponential backoff 1s/2s/4s preserved (verified in dashboard.service.spec.ts:128-167).
findings.verification: grep returns zero retryWhen hits anywhere in frontend/src.

findings.message: BalanceFormatResult extended with amountOnly: string. Pipe strips currency markers internally. Template reads balanceResult.amountOnly + renders ฿ from dedicated aria-hidden span. No .replace() chains in templates.
findings.verification: grep returns zero .replace('฿'/'THB') hits in template files.

findings.message: Pipes added to component providers[]; injected via inject() into private readonly fields. buildAriaLabel() uses injected pipe instances — no more `new <Pipe>()` calls. Intl.NumberFormat now constructed once per pipe instance.
findings.verification: grep for new <Pipe>() returns zero hits in production code.

findings.message: onRowSelect() body replaced with comment explaining v1.1 deferral. eslint-disable directive removed.
findings.verification: grep -rn console\. frontend/src returns one comment-line hit, zero actual console.* calls.

findings.message: role="listitem" removed from skeleton <li> rows. aria-hidden="true" retained on rows. Parent <ul> still carries aria-busy="true". Correct WCAG 2.1 AA composition.
findings.verification: loading-skeleton.component.spec.ts:37-47 asserts both aria-busy on list and aria-hidden on rows.

findings.message: New AuthService introduced without a companion auth.service.spec.ts. clearAuth(), constructor sessionStorage-init, and isAuthenticated() Observable form lack direct tests.
findings.suggested_fix: Add auth.service.spec.ts (~20 LOC) covering constructor init, setAuthenticated/clearAuth roundtrip, and Observable emission on signal change.

findings.message: _authenticated signal initialized once from sessionStorage at service construction. Safe today (providedIn:'root' singleton), but if any future login flow writes auth_token to sessionStorage without calling setAuthenticated(), signal will lag until reload.
findings.suggested_fix: Add JSDoc note stating all auth_token writes MUST go through AuthService.setAuthenticated().

regression_sweep.retry_filter_401_403: verified — throwError short-circuits in delay callback
regression_sweep.loading_skeleton_a11y: verified — aria-busy on parent retained, role=listitem removed from hidden children
